response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or C++-centric distributed systems design, despite some exposure to C++ in academic or minor roles.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven ability to lead ambiguous projects and build scalable tools (e.g., GISCollective, CI/CD infrastructure)
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of professional C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience with cloud compute platforms, distributed systems, or hardware architecture at scale
Minimal alignment with preferred qualifications like technical leadership in cloud/DevOps or architectural ownership of internal platforms
